calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee Calif. Prob. Code 15660 D; 17200.1 B 10
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
George Stemerman for petitioners Jessica Barker and Rebecca Bridges.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee.

Mr. Stemerman reported that the designated institutional successor trustee, Merrill Lynch, had declined to serve, and that the appointment process had not proceeded as originally planned. Mr. Stemerman stated that no party objected to the relief requested and, in response to the Court's inquiry, described the background and experience of the proposed successor trustees.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
